news.t: Small-cap ETFs keep the rally going

holdings.infoBox: ISCG is an equity ETF with a total of 948 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lumentum Holdings stock at 2.10%, ATI Inc. at 0.86%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.84%, MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings at 0.77%, and Lattice Semiconductor at 0.64%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar Small-Cap Growth ETF (ISCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap growth stocks. The index selects stocks from 90-99.5% of market cap that fall into Morningstar's growth style categorization. ISCG was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar US Small Cap Broad Growth Extended Index

data.title: Small-cap ETFs keep the rally going
data.text: Small-cap exchange-traded funds surged on Thursday, extending a winning streak that's lasted several months. Small-cap funds with a growth tilt were the big winners: the iShares Morningstar Small-Cap ...

data.title: Best Small-Cap ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best small-cap ETFs for Q1 2021 are SILJ, SGDJ, and JKK.
